subject: Social Sciences
note: Achievement objectives from the New Zealand Curriculum. Strands: Identity, Culture, and Organisation; Place and Environment; Continuity and Change; The Economic World.

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand that families are important for children in many different ways

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand that people have different roles and responsibilities as part of their belonging to groups

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how the past is important to people

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand that people have needs and wants and that these are satisfied in different ways

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how cultural practices reflect and express people's customs, traditions, and values

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how places influence people and people influence places

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how and why people make changes and the consequences of those changes

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how producers and consumers exercise choice in meeting their needs and wants

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how groups make and implement rules and laws that affect individuals, groups, and communities

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how the movement of people, goods, and ideas affects the culture and society of both the place of origin and destination

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how people remember and record the past in different ways

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how and why people find, buy, and sell resources and that this process benefits individuals, groups, and communities

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how formal and informal groups make decisions that impact on communities and that participation in decision-making differs

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how people participate individually and collectively in response to community challenges, including environmental challenges

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how exploration and innovation create opportunities and challenges for people, places, and environments

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how producers and consumers exercise choice in the allocation of scarce resources and that these choices have consequences

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how systems of government in New Zealand operate and how they affect individuals and groups

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how historical forces (colonisation, globalisation, technology) have shaped societies and ongoing change

objectives.subject: Social Sciences
objectives.text: Understand how microeconomic and macroeconomic forces influence individual, business, and government decisions
